basic_details.job_title: UP Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026 Notification Out – Apply Online for 229 Posts in Hathras District
basic_details.organization_name: Bal Vikas Vibhag (Child Development Department), Hathras, Uttar Pradesh
basic_details.department: Bal Vikas Pariyojana (Child Development Project), Hathras (8 Projects)
basic_details.total_vacancies: 229 (across 8 Bal Vikas Pariyojanas in Hathras district)
basic_details.short_information: Child Development Department Hathras is hiring 229 Anganwadi Worker posts with minimum Intermediate qualification, apply online within 21 days of advertisement at http://upanganwadibharti.in.

important_dates.advertisement publication date: To be published on http://upanganwadibharti.in (check official site)

application_fee.details: The official order does not mention any application fee for Anganwadi Worker recruitment. Candidates should verify on the official portal http://upanganwadibharti.in at the time of application, as fee details (if any) will be specified in the published advertisement.

age_limit.age_relaxation: Age relaxation as per UP Government rules for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD/Widow/Divorced candidates - check official advertisement for specific relaxation details.
age_limit.details: Age is calculated as on 01.01.2026. Only High School (Class 10th) mark sheet and certificate are valid for date of birth proof. No other document is accepted for age verification.

qualification.domicile: Must be resident of the same Ward / Gram Sabha where the Anganwadi vacancy exists. If no eligible candidate from the same Gram Sabha, selection will be from the concerned Nyaya Panchayat.
qualification.education_qualification: Minimum: Intermediate (10+2) or equivalent. Maximum qualification considered: Post Graduation (Parasnaatak). Merit is prepared based on combined marks from Intermediate + Graduation + Post Graduation (all examinations). Candidates must fill marks for all examinations (Intermediate, Graduation, Post Graduation) at the time of application.
qualification.details: Only female candidates are eligible. Candidates must be resident of the same Ward / Gram Sabha where the vacancy exists. All eligibility conditions must be fulfilled as on the respective cut-off dates. Only online applications submitted at http://upanganwadibharti.in within the stipulated 21-day window will be accepted.

vacancy_details.Description: Open to all castes. 128 posts across 8 projects.

vacancy_details.Category: Other Backward Class (OBC - Anya Pichhda Varg)
vacancy_details.Description: 48 posts across 8 projects. Valid OBC certificate required (online verifiable, issued by Tehsil).
53 posts across 8 projects. Valid SC certificate required (online verifiable, issued by Tehsil).

category_wise_vacancy.Description: 53 posts across 8 projects. Valid SC certificate required (online verifiable, issued by Tehsil).

salary_details.pay_scale: As per UP Government rules for Anganwadi Karyakatri (honorarium-based)

selection_process: Selection is purely merit-based. No written examination is conducted. Final selection is subject to eligibility verification
and document verification. In case of equal marks
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online through the UP Anganwadi Bharti portal (http://upanganwadibharti.in) only. No other mode of application will be accepted. Applications must be submitted within 21 days of the official advertisement publication date. The application form must be filled correctly and completely in the format available on the departmental website. Self-attested, clean, and legible copies of all documents mentioned in the application must be uploaded. Any error, incorrect data, or forged/fabricated documents will result in cancellation of candidature.
Documents Required to be Uploaded (Self-attested, clean and readable copies):
High School (Class 10th) marksheet and certificate - for Date of Birth proof
Intermediate (Class 12th) marksheet and certificate - mandatory for all applicants
important_instructions: THIS IS NOT A REGULAR GOVERNMENT EMPLOYMENT. Anganwadi Karyakatri is an honorary/contractual position under the Bal Vikas programme. Selected candidates will not be treated as regular government employees and will not be entitled to regular government employee benefits. Only female candidates are eligible. Male candidates cannot apply under any circumstances. Only residents of the same Ward / Gram Sabha where the Anganwadi vacancy exists are eligible. If no eligible candidate from the Gram Sabha, selection will be from the Nyaya Panchayat area. Merit is based on combined total marks of Intermediate + Graduation + Post Graduation. All exam marks must be accurately entered at time of application. Wrong entries or manipulation of marks will lead to cancellation and legal action. Tie-break is by age (higher age preferred), then by higher educational qualification - not by any other criteria. Applications will be accepted only for 21 days from the date of advertisement publication. Applications before or after this window will not be accepted. Only online applications at http://upanganwadibharti.in are valid. No offline, postal, or in-person applications will be entertained. Caste and residence certificates must be Tehsil-issued, digitally signed, and online verifiable. Manually issued or offline certificates will not be accepted. BPL income certificates must comply with GO No. 3959/1-9-11-10-9 dated 30.09.2011 and must be online verifiable to be accepted for BPL priority. Date of birth proof: Only High School (Class 10th) mark sheet / certificate is valid for age verification. No other document is accepted for date of birth. Reserved category posts will only accept applications from the respective reserved category. Unreserved posts are open to applicants from any caste/category. If any candidate is found to have provided false information, incorrect marks, or forged documents at any stage, their candidature will be cancelled and legal action will be initiated. The number of vacancies is provisional and may change as per actual administrative and judicial requirements of the department. All corrigenda and updates will be hosted on http://upanganwadibharti.in only - candidates should check the portal regularly.
